name: Ocal Browser V6.8.00
body:
OCAL BROWSER - UPDATE CATALOG
Version: 6.8.00 Stable
Release Date: June 14, 2026

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[STABLE RELEASE v6.8.00]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* BUMP VERSION: Updated to stable version 6.8.00.
* DESKTOP ICON PACKAGING: Resolved missing desktop shortcut icon issues by bundling icon.ico directly in the Inno Setup payload and linking it to the desktop and start menu shortcuts.
